items.final_wording: Lists reduced visual acuity, ciliary flush, photophobia, severe foreign-body sensation, corneal opacity, fixed pupil, severe headache with nausea, post-traumatic red eye, and immune compromise.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Conjunctivitis
source.population: Adults and children presenting with red eye or discharge; serious or atypical eye presentations require face-to-face assessment or referral.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for Dubai telehealth conjunctivitis and red-eye documentation; partial for broad eye pain, visual change, contact-lens complications, and trauma.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Lists reduced visual acuity, ciliary flush, photophobia, severe foreign-body sensation, corneal opacity, fixed pupil, severe headache with nausea, post-traumatic red eye, and immune compromise.

items.rationale: Supports photophobia with reduced acuity, pain, corneal, pupil and trauma warning context for photophobia documentation; no decision is generated.

items.final_wording: Lists sudden visual loss, sudden vision change, flashes or floaters with retinal signs, retinal detachment, acute diplopia, severe eye pain with nausea or vomiting, pain on eye movement, and new pupil defects.

source.title: Guidance for Professional Practice Annex 4: Urgency of referrals table
source.population: People with eye presentations requiring emergency, urgent, or priority referral triage.
source.exclusions: Exact for listed eye red flags and urgency categories; local UAE referral pathways and timing require clinician review.

exact_location.heading: Annex 4 — visual loss and other urgent presentations

source.evidence_paraphrase: Lists sudden visual loss, sudden vision change, flashes or floaters with retinal signs, retinal detachment, acute diplopia, severe eye pain with nausea or vomiting, pain on eye movement, and new pupil defects.

items.rationale: Supports severe eye pain and acute visual-change urgency context for photophobia documentation; no decision is generated.
